commit.message:
8381452: TestMultiplyReductionByte.java: Skip IR test on AArch64 for vector length above 128 bits

On AArch64, vector multiply reduction is only supported for 64/128-bit
vectors. See the code in Matcher::match_rule_supported_vector() [1].

Hence, we should skip the IR test in "runMulReduce256()" and
"runMulReduce512()" for AArch64.

[1] https://github.com/openjdk/jdk/blob/master/src/hotspot/cpu/aarch64/aarch64_vector.ad#L212-L220
